questions: What benchmarks matter in sports advertising?
How should brands plan and measure sports investments?
qa.answer: Benchmarks include exposure quality, reach/frequency, engagement, and sponsor impact metrics across leagues and platforms. Effectiveness depends on context, creative fit, and activation.
implication: Set clear objectives (awareness, consideration, sales lift) and match assets.
Measure sponsorship impact with brand/sales lift and modeled outcomes.
Integrate media + activation; optimize creative and placements by sport.
